nodes.label: Every class in agents/_impl/* must inherit from BaseAgent.
If the module uses ephemeris symbols, every class must have @require_ephemeris.
No `import requests` (or `from requests import ...`) outside data_room/.
Every .py file in agents/_impl/ (excluding _templates) must be referenced in AGE
`print(...)` at module top level is a smell; we allow it in tests/ and scripts/.
Thin wrapper exposing the report from a single file.      The CLI is still the e
